## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff`, `shellcheck --severity=warning`, `yamllint`)
- [ ] Added/updated a test for any behavior change
- [ ] Any new `uses:` action is pinned to a commit SHA with a `# vX.Y.Z` comment
- [ ] No secrets committed
